zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Belgrave於1466年4月出生在英國巴金哈姆爾沙安時，他的父親Sir John Belgrave26歲，母親Catherine Glynn24歲。他和Margaret de Cotton至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1508年在英國萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Belgrave于1466年4月出生在英国巴金哈姆爾沙安时，他的父亲Sir John Belgrave26岁，母亲Catherine Glynn24岁。他和Margaret de Cotton至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1508年在英国萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Belgrave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Leicestershire, recorded in Domesday Book as Merdegrave. The original name derived from Old English mearth ‘marten’ + grāf ‘grove’, but after the Norman Conquest the first element was taken to be Old French merde ‘dung, filth’, and changed to Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’, to remove the unpleasant association. A mid 12th-century writer refers to the place as ‘Merthegrave, nunc (now) Belegrava’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Belgrave was born in April 1466, in Chesham, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Sir John Belgrave, was 26 and his mother, Catherine Glynn, was 24. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Margaret de Cotton. He died in 1508, in Leicester, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Belgrave est né en avril 1466, à Chesham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Belgrave, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Catherine Glynn, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Margaret de Cotton. Il est décédé en 1508, à Leicester, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard Belgrave im April 1466 in Chesham, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Belgrave 26 und seine Mutter Catherine Glynn 24. Er hatte mit Margaret de Cotton mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1508 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Leicester, Leicestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Belgrave è nato il nel aprile 1466 nel Chesham, Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Belgrave, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Catherine Glynn, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Margaret de Cotton. Morì nel 1508, nel Leicester, Leicestershire, England, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Belgraveが1466年4月にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアチェシャムで生まれた時，父Sir John Belgraveは26歳，母Catherine Glynnは24歳であった。彼はMargaret de Cottonとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1508年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアレアイセスターで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Belgrave(이)가 1466년 4월 영국 벅잉함실르 체샤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Belgrave(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Glynn(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Margaret de Cotton(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1508년 영국 레이스스터실르 레이스스터에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Belgrave nasceu em abril de 1466, em Chesham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Belgrave, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Glynn, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Margaret de Cotton. Ele faleceu em 1508, em Leicester, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Belgrave родился апрель 1466 г. в местности чешам, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Belgrave было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Glynn, 24. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Margaret de Cotton. Он умер в 1508 г. в местности лисестир, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard Belgrave nació en abril de 1466, en Chesham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Belgrave, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Catherine Glynn, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Margaret de Cotton. Murió en 1508, en Leicester, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 42 años.
